type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/filters.py
note: case_sensitive param landed on sync_do_groupby/do_groupby (default=False, positioned right after 'default' param, before your with_counts). Sort/group key uses ignore_case postprocessing when not case_sensitive, then the output key is remapped to the original-case value from the first item in each group via a second make_attrgetter without postprocess. All existing groupby tests pass (10/10) plus full filters suite (163/163). Please add with_counts as the next positional/keyword param after case_sensitive in both sync_do_groupby and do_groupby, and rebase on the current file - the groupby list-comprehension logic in each now ends with 'if not case_sensitive: ... out = [...]; return out' instead of a bare return.
